perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a festive title card featuring the Costco Wholesale logo, cartoon imagery, Christmas decorations like trees and bells, and large text announcing a year-end sale. (2) The scene then shifts into a rapid-fire sequence of individual product shots within a warehouse store environment. (3) Each shot focuses on a specific stack of merchandise—including household items, chocolates, meat, snacks, and beverages—with price information overlaid prominently in the center.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy, fast-paced electronic background track begins and remains continuous throughout the video. (2) A male narrator speaks extremely rapidly in Mandarin, listing off product names and their specific discount details. (3) The audio delivery is consistent in its intensity, with no ambient noise or sound effects interrupting the flow of music and narration.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '2025 年末大甩賣' (2025 Year-End Sale) and '每週特價速報 12/22-12/28' (Weekly Special Report 12/22-12/28). (2) Functional Text: Continuous series of price breakdowns for brands such as '五月花' (Mayflower), '義美' (I-Mei), 'KINDER', 'POCKY', 'STARBUCKS', and 'DORITOS', displaying original price, savings, and current special price. (3) Decorative Text: '記得追蹤我們' (Remember to follow us) appears at the bottom with a hook-like intent.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Various shoppers are visible in the background of different warehouse aisles throughout the video.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Different areas of a large-scale warehouse retail store featuring industrial shelving, wooden pallets, and bulk-packaged goods.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a high-density informational advertisement for Costco Taiwan. It aims to drive consumer traffic by rapidly presenting a wide array of time-sensitive discounts, utilizing a fast-paced 'shoutcast' style narration to convey a sense of urgency and abundance.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly highlights prices, savings, and the Costco brand name to promote sales.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Ultra-fast Mandarin narration and centralized price tag graphic overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: This is a typical 'short-form catalog' video style optimized for mobile consumption and quick information intake.
